word: H1580 - גָּמַל - gâmal - gaw-mal' - Bestow on

sections.paragraph:
Original: גּמל

Transliteration: gâmal

Phonetic: gaw-mal'

BDB Definition:

  1. to deal fully with, recompense
    1. (Qal)
      1. to deal out to, do to
      2. to deal bountifully with
      3. to recompense, repay, requite
  2. (Qal) to wean a child
  3. (Qal) to ripen, bear ripe (almonds)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 360

Part(s) of speech: Verb
